name: USS SC-1064 (SC-1064)
events: 26 Nov 1943 USS Burrfish (T/Cdr. W.B. Perkins, Jr., USN) is joined by the submarine chasers USS SC-1063 (Lt. J.J. Scheffler, Jr., USN) and USS SC-1064 (?) which then escorted her to Key West.
31 May 1944 USS Barbel (Cdr. R.A. Keating, Jr., USN) departed Key West, Florida for Colon, Panama Canal Zone. She was escorted out by USS SC 1064 (Lt.(jg). C.S. Lenz, USNR).
